headline: Keurig Q1 Earnings & Sales Top, U.S. Refreshment Beverages Up 11.9%
summary: KDP tops Q1 earnings and sales estimates as U.S. Refreshment Beverages jumps 11.9% and the company reaffirms its 2026 outlook.

headline: Investors Heavily Search Tyson Foods, Inc. (TSN): Here is What You Need to Know

headline: Bipartisan Senators Push Hot Rotisserie Chicken Bill To Let SNAP Recipients Buy Ready-To-Eat Meals
summary: Bipartisan senators introduce bill to allow SNAP recipients to buy rotisserie chicken, citing affordability and practicality for families.
